languages.text: Time moves weirdly when the Chronomancer is present. Each time an extra turn is given, the special timer activates.

traits.locale_text: Time moves weirdly when the Chronomancer is present. Each time an extra turn is given, the special timer activates.

languages.text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.
languages.original_text: Time moves weirdly when the Chronomancer is present. Each time an extra turn is given, the special timer activates.

traits.locale_text: Time moves weirdly in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an extra turn is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.
Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.
Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an extra turn is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

languages.text: В присутствии хрономанта время ведет себя странно. Когда кто-либо совершает {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, его длительность ограничена 30 секундами.
languages.original_text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

traits.locale_text: В присутствии хрономанта время ведет себя странно. Когда кто-либо совершает {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, его длительность ограничена 30 секундами.
В присутствии хрономанта время ведет себя странно. Когда кто-либо совершает {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}дополнительный ход{/g}, его длительность ограничена 30 секундами.

languages.text: In Gegenwart des Chronomanten verhält sich die Zeit merkwürdig. Wird ein {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}Zusatzzug{/g} gewährt, ist dieser auf 30 Sekunden begrenzt.
languages.original_text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

traits.locale_text: In Gegenwart des Chronomanten verhält sich die Zeit merkwürdig. Wird ein {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}Zusatzzug{/g} gewährt, ist dieser auf 30 Sekunden begrenzt.

languages.text: El tiempo fluye de forma extraña en la presencia del Cronomante. Cada vez que se obtiene un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno adicional{/g}, dura tan solo 30 segundos.
languages.original_text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

traits.locale_text: El tiempo fluye de forma extraña en la presencia del Cronomante. Cada vez que se obtiene un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}turno adicional{/g}, dura tan solo 30 segundos.

languages.text: Zaman, Kronobaz'ın yakınında tuhaf biçimde akar. Her {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} kazanıldığında bu ek turda eylem gerçekleştirme süresi 30 saniyeyle sınırlıdır.
languages.original_text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

traits.locale_text: Zaman, Kronobaz'ın yakınında tuhaf biçimde akar. Her {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}ek tur{/g} kazanıldığında bu ek turda eylem gerçekleştirme süresi 30 saniyeyle sınırlıdır.

languages.text: 编时匠在场时，时间会发生紊乱。每个获得的{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}都有30秒倒计时。
languages.original_text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

traits.locale_text: 编时匠在场时，时间会发生紊乱。每个获得的{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}额外回合{/g}都有30秒倒计时。

languages.text: Le temps passe étrangement en présence du chronomancien. Chaque fois qu'un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} est accordé, il est limité à 30 secondes.
languages.original_text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

traits.locale_text: Le temps passe étrangement en présence du chronomancien. Chaque fois qu'un {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}tour supplémentaire{/g} est accordé, il est limité à 30 secondes.

languages.text: 時間操作者の存在下では、時間が奇妙に動く。{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}追加ターン{/g}が与えられるたびに、30秒間しか持続しないように時間調整が行われる。
languages.original_text: Time moves strangely in the Chronomancer's presence. Each time an {g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}extra turn{/g} is granted, it's timed to last only 30 seconds.

traits.locale_text: 時間操作者の存在下では、時間が奇妙に動く。{g|Encyclopedia:ExtraTurn}追加ターン{/g}が与えられるたびに、30秒間しか持続しないように時間調整が行われる。
